growth_news.title: University of Utah Launches New AI Degree!
growth_news.description: The University of Utah has approved a brand new bachelor's degree specifically in Artificial Intelligence! This is super exciting because it shows how schools are preparing students for the future of tech, opening up cool new career paths for young creators.

growth_news.title: The Department of Energy Explains AI for Kids and Citizens
growth_news.description: The U.S. Department of Energy created a helpful guide explaining how AI works and how it can help solve big world challenges. From protecting the environment to finding new green energy sources, this guide shows AI is a super-tool for good!

growth_news.title: Paca Helps Humans and AI Work as Teammates
growth_news.description: A cool new free tool called Paca lets humans and AI agents plan projects together like equal team members. It is designed to make organizing tasks super easy and shows how we can team up with technology to make amazing ideas come to life.

tech_news.title: Play a Game Built by an AI Model!
tech_news.description: A clever developer used a creative AI model to help build a fun game called 'Shepherd's Dog.' It demonstrates how young game designers can use AI as a programming partner to bring their imagination to life in interactive worlds.

tech_news.title: AI Learns the Secret Language of Molecules
tech_news.description: Scientists have created a new description system that helps AI understand the 3D shapes of molecules. Think of it like teaching a computer how to read 3D puzzle pieces, which will help it design life-saving medicines much faster!

tech_news.title: Why Open Source AI is Great for Everyone
tech_news.description: 'Open source' means sharing the secret recipes of technology so anyone in the world can learn from them and build their own projects. Making AI open source ensures that kids, students, and creators everywhere have the power to invent the future together.

jargons.definition: A computer system designed to mimic how the human brain thinks and learns.
jargons.example: Imagine a massive connect-the-dots puzzle where the dots light up and work together to recognize a drawing of a cat.
jargons.use_case: Helping self-driving cars spot stop signs and pedestrians.

jargons.definition: A smart trick that helps an AI focus on the most important words in a sentence.
jargons.example: If you read 'The big heavy box fell and it broke,' your brain knows 'it' refers to the box. Self-attention helps the computer make that same connection.
jargons.use_case: Translating stories from French to English without losing the meaning.

jargons.definition: Giving an AI a textbook to look up facts before it tries to answer your questions.
jargons.example: It is like an open-book exam for a robot helper, so it does not have to guess and make things up.
jargons.use_case: A homework helper AI that reads your specific school textbook to answer your study questions perfectly.

jargons.definition: Teaching a computer program through trial, error, and points.
jargons.example: Like teaching a puppy to sit by giving it a treat every time it does it right, and no treat when it gets distracted.
jargons.use_case: Training an AI character to beat level 1 of a video game by rewarding it for surviving.

jargons.definition: Taking an AI that is already generally smart and giving it extra training to make it an expert in one specific subject.
jargons.example: It is like a high school student going to a special weekend camp to become a champion robot designer.
jargons.use_case: Teaching a general chatbot to speak like a 17th-century pirate for a video game.

tools.name: Cursor
tools.trending_factor: It makes coding feel like chatting with a super-smart friend who types out the code for you.

tools.name: NotebookLM
tools.trending_factor: It can instantly turn your school notes into a realistic, fun podcast where two AI hosts chat about your homework.

tools.name: v0 by Vercel
tools.trending_factor: You can design and build a functional website or app interface just by describing what you want in plain English.

tools.name: Midjourney
tools.trending_factor: It creates jaw-dropping, high-quality illustrations and concept art from the wildest prompts you can think up.

tools.name: ElevenLabs
tools.trending_factor: It generates incredibly realistic sound effects and character voices, making it a favorite for young game creators and storytellers.
